# Supplier Performance Management: KPIs and Governance for Critical Equipment Vendors

## 适用受众
Sourcing_Manager

## 写作角度说明
采购不是一次性交易，持续的供应商绩效管理才能确保长期价值。本角度帮助采购专家建立供应商绩效评估体系，推动供应商持续改进。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Systematic supplier performance management—KPI tracking, regular reviews, continuous improvement—ensures that procurement relationships deliver ongoing value rather than degrading over time.

## 参考素材
- Key performance indicators: on-time delivery, quality (defect rate), response time, documentation quality
- Performance review cadence: quarterly business reviews, annual assessments, continuous monitoring
- Scorecard methodology: weighted scoring, trend analysis, peer benchmarking
- Corrective action process: issue identification, root cause analysis, improvement plans, verification
- Supplier development: capability building, technology roadmap sharing, partnership progression
- Relationship governance: escalation paths, dispute resolution, contract renewal criteria

## 关键词
Supplier Performance, KPI Management, Scorecard, Continuous Improvement, Vendor Governance, Business Review, Corrective Action
